arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Liverpool make Haaland enquiry; Man Utd consider Gomes reunion
arts.sum: Liverpool and PSG have reached out to Erling Haaland over a future move, but the striker would prefer to head to Barcelona if he leaves Manchester City. Liverpool could rival Newcastle for Crystal Palace defender Marc Guehi, who seems unlikely to sign a new contract at Selhurst Park.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Bournemouth – Predicted line up and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool host Bournemouth in the Premier League on Saturday as the Reds look to respond to a shock setback last time out. Arne Slot suffered his first defeat as Liverpool manager as Nottingham Forest earned an upset win at Anfield, securing their first victory over the Reds on Merseyside since 1969 courtesy of Callum Hudson-Odoi’s […] The post Liverpool vs Bournemouth – Predicted line up and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: “Now you see” – Arne Slot delighted with performance levels of Liverpool ace
arts.sum: Notwithstanding their loss to Nottingham Forest at Anfield last weekend, Arne Slot has to be happy with the way in which his start as Liverpool manager has panned out. Indeed, Callum Hudson-Odoi’s brilliantly taken finish was the first goal they’d conceded in the Premier League, over three and a half games into the 2024/25 season. arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Bournemouth – Match Preview and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool welcome Bournemouth to the North West this Saturday and Arne Slot will be hoping for improvement from last time out at Anfield. Nottingham Forest caused an upset last weekend, as a curling effort from Callum Hudson-Odoi condemned the Reds to a rare home defeat and their first dropped points of the season.
